description_long: This is a compact, open-top red pickup truck with a rugged, utilitarian design. The vehicle features a prominent black front grille guard, circular headlights, and a flat windshield with a simple frame. The side profile reveals two doors, exposed roll bars, and a small cargo bed at the rear, suitable for light hauling or urban deliveries. The wheels are silver with a five-spoke design, and the interior includes brown seats and a basic dashboard. The rear view shows a ribbed cargo bed and minimalistic taillights, emphasizing its practical nature. The overall styling is boxy and functional, reminiscent of classic off-road vehicles.
description: A compact, red open-top pickup truck with a black grille guard, exposed roll bars, and a small cargo bed. It has a rugged, utilitarian appearance and simple, functional details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black grille guard, circular headlights, and flat windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two doors, brown seats, exposed roll bars, and silver wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the ribbed cargo bed, minimalistic taillights, and open rear section.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the door, roll bars, and wheel details.
